abilities.description: Put target creature card with mana value X from your graveyard onto the battlefield with a finality counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.
abilities.target_prompt: Choose target creature card in your graveyard

triggers.description: At the beginning of your postcombat main phase, if four or more cards are in your graveyard, conjure a card named Mox Jet into your hand. This ability triggers only once.
